overbought-short.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-08 manually — backtest 6mo: 11% win rate, -$2,065 over 9 trades on 9 mega-cap basket. Strategy shorted into 8/9 trend continuations in a bull market. Re-enable only after refactor adds market-regime filter (see CLAUDE.md backlog 'overbought-short refactor'). Do NOT auto-resume.
overbought-short.llm_note: manual override (Claude + user) based on backtest evidence — pre-empts the adapter's auto-pause-after-5-losses, which would have cost ~$1k of additional drawdown before triggering

options-momentum.rationale: Pauzowane poprawnie do 2026-05-14. Pre-ustawiam size_multiplier=0.5 (nie 1.0 default) na re-enable: kara za 0% WR lifetime + brak regime gate który kosztował nas -3.22% dziś. Pierwsza runda po wznowieniu = POŁOWA standardowego rozmiaru aż do min. 5 trades z pozytywnym expectancy. side_bias=null wymuszony — żadna strona nie jest dopuszczona przy SPY RSI 82.4 bez dodatkowych warunków.

geo-xom.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-13 — geo-monitor pipeline incomplete. geo-monitor wysyła payload do Cloudflare worker→routine, ale routine path jest deprecated od v2.2. Brak direct execution dla geo signals. geo-xom strategy nigdy nie wygeneruje XOM trade w obecnej architekturze. Re-enable after geo-monitor direct execution ships (backlog 2026-05-20).
geo-xom.evidence: geo-monitor/monitor.py line 252-277 — send_alert tylko POSTuje do CLOUDFLARE_GEO_WORKER_URL, brak place_stock_bracket call

crypto-momentum.rationale: Hold — brak trades w 14 dniach prawdopodobnie poprawny przy BTC RSI 64.3 (poniżej progów wejścia). Nie wyłączam bez diagnozy pipeline (patrz heuristic proposal #3). BTC neutralny ≠ dead — czekamy na ruch.

crypto-breakdown.rationale: Hold — analogicznie do crypto-momentum. 14 dni milczenia przy ETH RSI 50.4 jest zgodne z brakiem setup. Potrzebna weryfikacja pipeline zanim wyłączymy.

MSTR.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-08 manually — backtest 6mo: 2 trades / 0% WR / -$2,364 ($-11.82% avg). MSTR is BTC-with-leverage; momentum-long breakouts get gap-down-killed during BTC volatility. Re-enable only after (a) momentum confirmation filter is added (3 consec up days before breakout) AND backtest re-run shows positive P&L, OR (b) BTC enters confirmed sideways/uptrend regime.
MSTR.review_after: 2026-06-01 OR earlier if BTC volatility drops + new backtest

SMCI.rationale: DISABLED 2026-05-08 manually — backtest 6mo: 2 trades / 0% WR / -$2,109 ($-10.54% avg). SMCI is high-beta AI single-name with 'stockmania' dynamics — breakouts on hype, gap-down on guidance/earnings. Strategy systematically wrong-way on this ticker. Re-enable only with momentum confirmation filter + earnings-aware skip.
